name: ACKPLN_GRUPURUND
definition:
CREATE VIEW [dbo].[ACKPLN_GRUPURUND] AS
SELECT     AG.AMBAR_KODU, SA.STOKSUB_REF AS STOK_REF,0 VARYANT_REF, SUM(AG.ACIK_MIKTAR * ((SA.MIKTAR / SBA.CARPAN1 * SBA.CARPAN2) 
                      / (S.ALT_BIRIM_ADEDI / SBS.CARPAN1 * SBS.CARPAN2))) AS ACIK_MIKTAR
FROM         dbo.STOKALT AS SA WITH(NOLOCK) INNER JOIN
                      dbo.ACKPLN_GRUPURUN AS AG WITH(NOLOCK) ON AG.VARYANT_REF=0 AND SA.STOK_REF = AG.STOK_REF INNER JOIN
                      dbo.STOKKARTI AS S WITH(NOLOCK) ON  S.VARYANT=0 AND SA.STOK_REF = S.STOK_REF INNER JOIN
                      dbo.STOKBIRIM AS SBS WITH(NOLOCK) ON SBS.VARYANT_REF=0 AND S.ALT_BIRIM_REF = SBS.BIRIM_REF INNER JOIN
                      dbo.STOKBIRIM AS SBA WITH(NOLOCK) ON SBA.VARYANT_REF=0 AND SA.BIRIM_REF = SBA.BIRIM_REF
GROUP BY SA.STOKSUB_REF, AG.AMBAR_KODU
